context: Agent must extract an interface from a concrete repository and refactor a service class to accept the interface via constructor injection

checklist.name: IOrderRepository interface file produced
checklist.description: A file named IOrderRepository.ts exists and exports an interface or type named IOrderRepository

checklist.name: Interface declares findById
checklist.description: IOrderRepository includes a findById method signature returning a Promise of an Order or null

checklist.name: Interface declares save
checklist.description: IOrderRepository includes a save method signature accepting an Order and returning Promise<void>

checklist.name: OrderService accepts interface via constructor
checklist.description: The refactored OrderService.ts has a constructor parameter typed to IOrderRepository (not PostgresOrderRepository)

checklist.name: No concrete import in refactored service
checklist.description: OrderService.ts does not import PostgresOrderRepository anywhere

checklist.name: Business logic preserved
checklist.description: getOrderTotal and markShipped methods are present and contain the same calculation and status-update logic as the original
